title: CarbonApps is live - New monday.com App Development Company from CarbonWeb

posts.author: CarbonApps (CarbonApps)
posts.cookedHtml:
We Just Launched CarbonApps!

Built by the Same Team You Know from CarbonWeb!

We are super excited to share some news we’ve been working on for a while: We’ve officially launched CarbonApps, a dedicated app development company focused entirely on building tools just for monday users.

If you’ve ever used one of our apps (like PhoneBurner, RingCentral SMS, Toolbelt,) or used one of The Monday Man’s (@JCorrell) Apps, you’ve already experienced what CarbonApps is all about: solving real workflow challenges with simple, effective solutions right on monday.

So, why the change?

For the past couple of years, these apps were being developed under CarbonWeb, our consulting and solutions team. But as the apps grew and the demand increased, it became clear that we needed a separate team with 100% focus to keep up, and that’s how CarbonApps was born.

What’s changing?

For current users: Not much, really! Your apps will still work the same way, but now CarbonApps will handle support and updates directly.

For partners and clients: CarbonWeb will continue to support, demo, and refer to CarbonApps products just like we do with other trusted apps and partners in the monday ecosystem.

We’ve got a bunch of exciting updates and new apps in the works, and launching CarbonApps means we can bring them to you faster and more consistently.

Thanks so much to this awesome community for the support and feedback over the years, we wouldn’t be here without it.

If you want to check out what we’re up to, visit carbonapps.co

Connect with us on LinkedIn →
